description: Style NoteClassic sneakers from numero uno, referenced from the all-sport lifestyle for the cosmopolitan male. An icon of casual dressing, wear this with a straightforward combination of jeans and a favourite tee.Product DetailsOlive green shoe with synthetic leather upper with aggressive stitch detailingReinforced overlay on the heel cup and toe box for abrasion free comfortCentral lacing system for a customised FitPadded tongue and collar for instep comfortMesh lining for breathabilityBranding on the side, heel and tonguePU midsole with foxing for shock absorption and all day comfortTPU outsole with circular lugs and waffle patterned grooves for grip and tractionMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe synthetic leather surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
